instructions.name: accept_config_authority
docs: Pending config authority accepts the handoff.

instructions.name: accept_registry_authority
docs: Pending token registry authority accepts the handoff.

instructions.name: accrue_yield
docs: Accrue yield for a yield-bearing token (permissionless). Pulls the latest cUSDC rate from
the lending program, advances `user_index_q64`, and credits `protocol_owed_underlying`.

instructions.name: cancel_withdrawal
docs: Cancel a pending withdrawal for a specific token.

instructions.name: claim_protocol_yield_fee
docs: Claim accumulated protocol yield (fee_recipient only). Redeems up to
`protocol_owed_underlying` USDC from the share_vault.

accounts.name: fee_recipient
docs: Must be the fee_recipient (verified inside the handler against `global_config.fee_recipient`).

instructions.name: cooperative_unlock_channel_funds
docs: Instantly release channel collateral when both channel counterparties consent.

instructions.name: create_channel
docs: Create a token-specific channel from payer to payee. Must be called before any payment commitments are signed or settled.
Payer signs and pays ~0.002 SOL rent. Ensures payees and facilitators never pay for creation.

instructions.name: deposit
docs: Deposit tokens into the vault (credits signer's vault).

instructions.name: deposit_for
docs: Deposit a registered token for multiple participants in one tx.
Funder's ATA to vault; credits each recipient.
amounts.len() must equal remaining participant bucket slots. Max 16 recipients.

instructions.name: deposit_yield_bearing
docs: Deposit USDC and receive a credit of agUSDC shares. The protocol CPIs into the lending
program to mint cUSDC into its share_vault.

instructions.name: execute_unlock_channel_funds
docs: Execute a previously requested collateral unlock once its timelock expires.

instructions.name: execute_update_channel_authorized_signer
docs: Execute a previously requested authorized-signer rotation once its timelock expires.

instructions.name: execute_withdrawal_timelocked
docs: Execute a withdrawal for a specific token after timelock expires.

accounts.name: withdrawal_destination
docs: Destination token account (any valid token ATA — participant or 3rd party).

accounts.name: fee_recipient_token_account
docs: Fee recipient's token account for the token being withdrawn.

instructions.name: execute_withdrawal_yield_bearing
docs: Execute a previously requested withdrawal once its timelock expires. Redeems the
proportional cUSDC into USDC and pays user (net) and fee_recipient (fee).

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the protocol: creates GlobalConfig PDA.
`chain_id` selects the immutable settlement domain and default timing policy.

accounts.name: fee_recipient
docs: Wallet that receives registration-fee lamports and owns fee token accounts.

accounts.name: upgrade_authority
docs: Program's upgrade authority performs the one-time bootstrap.

instructions.name: initialize_participant
docs: One-time participant registration.

instructions.name: initialize_token_registry
docs: Initialize the token registry (authority only, called once after program deployment).

instructions.name: lock_channel_funds
docs: Lock tokens as ring-fenced collateral for a specific payee channel.

instructions.name: register_participant_bls_key
docs: Register a BLS key used only for cooperative clearing rounds.

instructions.name: register_token
docs: Register a new token in the registry (authority only).

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault token account for this token (created when token is registered)

accounts.name: mint
docs: Mint to register

accounts.name: authority
docs: Registry authority

instructions.name: register_yield_bearing_token
docs: Register a yield-bearing wrapper token (e.g. agUSDC). Creates a TokenEntry with
`kind = YieldBearing`, allocates a `YieldStrategy` PDA, and creates the protocol-owned
`share_vault` (a cUSDC ATA whose authority is the GlobalConfig PDA). Authority-only.

accounts.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint (USDC).

accounts.name: yield_program
docs: Lending program (mock-yield in dev / Save-Kamino in prod). Validated against `Reserve`.

accounts.name: reserve
docs: Existing `Reserve` PDA in the yield program. Must be initialised already.

accounts.name: share_mint
docs: Lending share mint (cUSDC). Mint authority = `reserve`.

accounts.name: liquidity_vault
docs: Reserve's USDC vault — kept for symmetry/CPI ergonomics.

accounts.name: share_vault
docs: Protocol-owned cUSDC ATA under GlobalConfig PDA. PDA-seeded so it is deterministic.

instructions.name: request_unlock_channel_funds
docs: Request a timelocked partial unlock of channel collateral.

instructions.name: request_update_channel_authorized_signer
docs: Request a timelocked rotation of the channel's authorized signer.

instructions.name: request_withdrawal
docs: Request a timelocked withdrawal for a specific token.

accounts.name: withdrawal_destination
docs: The withdrawal destination token account

instructions.name: request_withdrawal_yield_bearing
docs: Request a timelocked withdrawal of `shares` agUSDC, redeemable to `destination` (USDC ATA).

instructions.name: settle_clearing_round
docs: BLS-authenticated cooperative clearing round: advances many logical channels and applies
only net participant balance changes through bucket accounts.

instructions.name: settle_commitment_bundle
docs: Settle many latest commitments for one payee across many unilateral channels.

instructions.name: settle_individual
docs: Settle a single payment commitment. Submitter must be the payee or an authorized settler.

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Update protocol configuration (authority only).
Settlement chain_id and default timing policies are immutable and cannot be changed.

accounts.name: authority
docs: Config authority — only this key can update config.

instructions.name: update_inbound_channel_policy
docs: Update the participant's inbound channel policy.

instructions.name: update_registry_authority
docs: Nominate a pending token registry authority.

accounts.name: current_authority
docs: Current authority

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance for this operation

errors.name: WithdrawalAlreadyPending
errors.msg: A withdrawal is already pending

errors.name: NoWithdrawalPending
errors.msg: No withdrawal is currently pending

errors.name: WithdrawalLocked
errors.msg: Unlock timelock has not yet expired

errors.name: InvalidWithdrawalDestination
errors.msg: Invalid withdrawal destination address

errors.name: InvalidAuthority
errors.msg: Authority cannot be the zero address

errors.name: InvalidFeeRecipient
errors.msg: Fee recipient cannot be the zero address

errors.name: InvalidInboundChannelPolicy
errors.msg: Invalid inbound channel policy

errors.name: UnauthorizedInitializer
errors.msg: Only the program upgrade authority can initialize the protocol

errors.name: InvalidFeeBps
errors.msg: Fee BPS must be between 3 (0.03%) and 30 (0.3%)

errors.name: InvalidRegistrationFee
errors.msg: Registration fee must be 0 or between 0.001 and 0.01 SOL

errors.name: InvalidDepositFor
errors.msg: Invalid deposit_for: amounts length must match recipients, max 16

errors.name: AmountMustBePositive
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: CommitmentAmountMustIncrease
errors.msg: Committed amount must be greater than the previously settled amount

errors.name: InvalidAuthoritySignature
errors.msg: Invalid authority signature

errors.name: SignatureAlreadyUsed
errors.msg: This signature or clearing round has already been used

errors.name: ParticipantNotFound
errors.msg: Participant not found

errors.name: AccountIdMismatch
errors.msg: Account participant_id does not match message participant_id

errors.name: InvalidCommitmentMessage
errors.msg: Invalid payment commitment message format

errors.name: InvalidClearingRoundMessage
errors.msg: Invalid clearing round message format

errors.name: NetFlowImbalance
errors.msg: Net flow sums do not balance

errors.name: NetPositionOverflow
errors.msg: Net position computation overflowed

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidChainId
errors.msg: Chain ID is not supported by this deployment configuration

errors.name: InvalidMessageDomain
errors.msg: Message domain does not match this deployment

errors.name: InvalidSignature
errors.msg: Ed25519 signature verification failed

errors.name: InvalidBlsPublicKey
errors.msg: Invalid BLS public key

errors.name: InvalidBlsSignature
errors.msg: Invalid BLS aggregate signature

errors.name: InvalidBlsProofOfPossession
errors.msg: Invalid BLS proof of possession

errors.name: ParticipantBlsKeyNotFound
errors.msg: Participant inline BLS key is not registered

errors.name: ParticipantBlsKeyAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Participant already has a registered BLS key

errors.name: AccountBlsKeyMismatch
errors.msg: BLS key registration does not match the participant

errors.name: BlsSyscallFailed
errors.msg: BLS syscall failed or is unavailable on this cluster

errors.name: CpiNotAllowed
errors.msg: CPI calls to settlement instructions are not allowed

errors.name: InvalidEd25519Data
errors.msg: Invalid Ed25519 instruction data

errors.name: ChannelNotInitialized
errors.msg: Channel must be initialized before use - call create_channel first

errors.name: ChannelAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Channel already exists for this payer-payee pair

errors.name: UnauthorizedSettler
errors.msg: Only the payee or authorized settler can submit this payment commitment

errors.name: InboundChannelConsentRequired
errors.msg: Payee consent is required to create this inbound channel

errors.name: CounterpartyConsentRequired
errors.msg: Counterparty consent is required for cooperative channel unlock

errors.name: InboundChannelsDisabled
errors.msg: This participant does not accept inbound channels

errors.name: SelfChannelNotAllowed
errors.msg: Self-channels are not allowed

errors.name: NoPendingAuthorityTransfer
errors.msg: No authority transfer is currently pending

errors.name: UnauthorizedPendingAuthority
errors.msg: Only the nominated pending authority can accept this transfer

errors.name: TooManyTokenBalances
errors.msg: Maximum token balances per participant exceeded

errors.name: TokenNotFound
errors.msg: Token ID not registered in token registry

errors.name: TokenAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Token mint already registered

errors.name: TokenIdAlreadyInUse
errors.msg: Token ID already in use

errors.name: UnauthorizedTokenRegistration
errors.msg: Unauthorized token registration

errors.name: InvalidTokenId
errors.msg: Token ID must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidTokenSymbol
errors.msg: Token symbol must be valid ASCII

errors.name: InvalidTokenDecimals
errors.msg: Token decimals exceed the protocol maximum

errors.name: TokenRegistryFull
errors.msg: Token registry account is full

errors.name: InvalidTokenMint
errors.msg: Token account mint doesn't match registered token

errors.name: InsufficientLockedBalance
errors.msg: Requested unlock amount exceeds the channel's locked balance

errors.name: NoChannelUnlockPending
errors.msg: No channel unlock is currently pending

errors.name: InvalidAuthorizedSigner
errors.msg: Authorized signer cannot be the zero address or the current signer

errors.name: NoAuthorizedSignerUpdatePending
errors.msg: No authorized signer update is currently pending

errors.name: BucketAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Bucket account does not match the expected bucket id or PDA

errors.name: BucketSlotMismatch
errors.msg: Bucket slot does not match the expected logical row

errors.name: BucketSlotAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Bucket slot is already initialized

errors.name: BucketFull
errors.msg: Bucket has no remaining free slots

errors.name: OwnerAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Owner is already registered

errors.name: TokenIsYieldBearing
errors.msg: Token id is yield-bearing; use the yield-bearing instruction variant

errors.name: TokenIsNotYieldBearing
errors.msg: Token id is plain; use the plain deposit/withdrawal instruction

errors.name: InvalidYieldStrategy
errors.msg: YieldStrategy account does not match the registered token configuration

errors.name: InsufficientProtocolYield
errors.msg: Requested protocol yield claim exceeds accrued protocol yield

errors.name: YieldUnderlyingMismatch
errors.msg: Yield-bearing underlying mint does not match the lending reserve

errors.name: SolvencyInvariantBroken
errors.msg: Solvency invariant violated: share_vault USDC value < user_owed + protocol_owed

errors.name: InvalidYieldProgram
errors.msg: Yield program account does not match strategy.yield_program

errors.name: InvalidProtocolYieldShareBps
errors.msg: Protocol yield share bps exceeds the maximum allowed value

fields.name: authority
docs: Active config authority - can update fee_recipient, fee_bps, etc.
Bootstrap starts with the program upgrade authority until any nominated authority accepts.

fields.name: fee_recipient
docs: Wallet that receives registration-fee lamports and owns per-token fee accounts.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Withdrawal fee in basis points (default 30 = 0.3%)

fields.name: withdrawal_timelock_seconds
docs: Seconds before a pending available-balance withdrawal becomes executable.

fields.name: registration_fee_lamports
docs: Flat SOL fee at initialize_participant (default 0)

fields.name: next_participant_id
docs: Auto-incrementing participant ID counter

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: chain_id
docs: Protocol chain identifier used in signed message validation.

fields.name: message_domain
docs: Immutable deployment-scoped domain used by signed settlement messages.

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority that must explicitly accept before a handoff completes.

fields.name: channel_unlock_timelock_seconds
docs: Seconds before a unilateral channel-collateral unlock becomes executable.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved for future config expansion.

types.name: TokenEntry
docs: Token registry entry
Total: 56 bytes per entry (was 51 in v5; +1 for `kind`, +4 reserved for future fields).

fields.name: id
docs: Unique 2-byte token identifier (0-65,535)

fields.name: mint
docs: SPL token mint address (or `Pubkey::default()` for yield-bearing wrapper tokens
that have no separate mint).

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token decimals for amount validation. For yield-bearing wrappers this matches the
underlying so balance display / commitment math stays uniform.

fields.name: symbol
docs: ASCII symbol (e.g., "TOK1", "TOK2") - null-terminated

fields.name: registered_at
docs: Unix timestamp when token was registered (immutable)

fields.name: kind
docs: `0 = Plain`, `1 = YieldBearing` (see TOKEN_KIND_* consts).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved padding for future fields (do not change the size — accounts are pre-allocated).

fields.name: authority
docs: Registry authority - can register new tokens

fields.name: tokens
docs: Array of registered token entries stored inside a fixed-size account.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump

fields.name: pending_authority
docs: Pending authority that must explicitly accept before a handoff completes.

fields.name: token_id
docs: agUSDC token id (the yield-bearing wrapper this strategy represents).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for `[YIELD_STRATEGY_SEED, token_id_le]`.

fields.name: share_vault_bump
docs: PDA bump for `[YIELD_SHARE_VAULT_SEED, token_id_le]`.

fields.name: protocol_yield_share_bps
docs: Protocol's slice of new yield, in basis points. `3_333` = 33.33%.

fields.name: underlying_mint
docs: Underlying SPL mint (e.g. USDC). Same as `mock_yield::Reserve.underlying_mint`.

fields.name: yield_program
docs: Mock-yield (or production lending) program id.

fields.name: reserve
docs: `Reserve` account in the yield program.

fields.name: share_mint
docs: Lending share mint (e.g. cUSDC).

fields.name: share_vault
docs: Protocol-owned ATA holding cUSDC, authority = GlobalConfig PDA. Single ATA backs both
users and the protocol fee.

fields.name: liquidity_vault
docs: `Reserve.liquidity_vault` cached for CPI ergonomics.

fields.name: user_index_q64
docs: Q64.64 index: 1 agUSDC share -> (user_index_q64 / 2^64) USDC. Starts at `Q64_ONE`,
monotonically non-decreasing under accrual, never decreases under deposits/withdrawals.

fields.name: last_settled_underlying
docs: USDC value of `share_vault` as of last accrual. Used to detect new yield in `accrue_yield`.

fields.name: total_user_shares
docs: Sum of agUSDC `available + withdrawing` across all participant buckets for this token.
Sanity counter; truth still lives in buckets. Used by `accrue_yield` to compute per-share
yield attribution and to enforce the invariant.

fields.name: protocol_owed_underlying
docs: Protocol's USDC claim. Increases only inside `accrue_yield`. Decreases only inside
`claim_protocol_yield_fee`. Never touched by deposit/withdraw/channel paths.

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Padding for future fields (e.g. additional fee tiers, snapshot history).
